generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are increasingly relying on us for their defense? While some argue for reducing commitments, maintaining strong alliances is actually the best way to ensure our own security. When partners share the burden, we all benefit from a more stable and predictable international environment. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
